# BB Protocol — Cognitive Avatar Protocol

> Web4.0 Cognitive Ownership Infrastructure — Behavior as Contract · Memory as Eternity · Resonance as Divinity · Awakening as Freedom

## Overview
- [Home](/): Dashboard and main interface for the BB Protocol platform
- [API Health](/api/health): System health check endpoint

## API Endpoints
- [Dashboard Data](/api/dashboard): Core dashboard metrics and analytics
- [Avatars](/api/avatars): Cognitive Avatar CRUD operations
- [Avatar Detail](/api/avatars/%7Bid%7d): Individual avatar management
- [Unlock Skill](/api/avatars/%7Bid%7d/unlock-skill): Avatar skill unlocking
- [Skills](/api/skills): Skill vault and tier management
- [Delegations](/api/delegations): IFP/Fluid Democracy delegation system
- [Revenues](/api/revenues): Revenue stream tracking and analytics
- [Resonance](/api/resonance): Resonance wave computation and visualization
- [Compliance](/api/compliance): Multi-jurisdiction compliance monitoring
- [Security](/api/security): Security audit and threat detection
- [Deployment](/api/deployment): Smart contract deployment center
- [Monitoring](/api/monitoring): System monitoring and alerting
- [Performance](/api/performance): Performance dashboard and optimization
- [Feature Flags](/api/feature-flags): Feature flag management and canary deployments
- [Multichain](/api/multichain): Multi-chain deployment and bridge management
- [SDK Platform](/api/sdk-platform): Developer SDK and API key management
- [Ecosystem](/api/ecosystem): Ecosystem hub and partner integration
- [DAO Governance](/api/dao-governance): DAO proposal voting and governance
- [Web3 Integration](/api/web3-integration): Web3 wallet and contract interaction
- [Liquidity](/api/liquidity): LP liquidity pool management
- [Data Infrastructure](/api/data-infra): Data infrastructure and IPFS pinning
- [Contracts Architecture](/api/contracts-arch): Smart contract architecture viewer
- [Engine Architecture](/api/engine-arch): Cognitive engine architecture
- [Engine Status](/api/engine-status): Real-time engine module status
- [Contract Simulation](/api/contracts/simulate): Contract revenue simulation
- [Seed Data](/api/seed): Database seeding endpoint

## Key Concepts
- **Cognitive Avatar**: AI-powered digital twin representing user's cognitive patterns on-chain
- **Resonance Score**: Metric measuring alignment between avatar behavior and user intent
- **IFP Delegation**: Intent-Followed-Protocol delegation for fluid democracy
- **x402 Payment**: Micro-payment protocol for avatar skill unlocking
- **DID**: Decentralized Identity for avatar ownership verification
- **Multi-chain**: Cross-chain deployment on Base L2, Ethereum, and other EVM chains
